mapper.select: SELECT M.MONTH, NVL(COUNT(U.USER_NO),0) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(LEVEL,'FM00') AS MONTH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ) M LEFT JOIN SS_USER U ON SUBSTR(U.USER_REG,1,4) = #{year} AND SUBSTR(U.USER_REG,5,2) = M.MONTH GROUP BY M.MONTH ORDER BY M.MONTH

SELECT D.DAY, NVL(COUNT(U.USER_NO), 0) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(LEVEL, 'FM00') AS DAY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER( TO_CHAR( LAST_DAY( TO_DATE(#{year} || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), 'YYYYMM') ), 'DD' ) ) ) D LEFT JOIN SS_USER U ON SUBSTR(U.USER_REG, 1, 4) = #{year} AND SUBSTR(U.USER_REG, 5, 2) = LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') AND SUBSTR(U.USER_REG, 7, 2) = D.DAY GROUP BY D.DAY ORDER BY D.DAY
